headline: AI Protein Design: RFDiffusion, ProteinMPNN, and the Nobel Revolution
description: AI protein design has entered the post-AlphaFold era. RFDiffusion generates novel protein structures from scratch; ProteinMPNN designs sequences that fold into desired shapes; the 2024 Nobel Prize validated this revolution — transforming drug discovery and biotechnology.

citation.name: De novo design of protein structure and function with RFdiffusion
Robust deep learning–based protein sequence design using ProteinMPNN
